author: jamescvermont-cyber
description: Animal guessing game — the bot shows a photo of a mystery animal and players have 60 seconds to guess it. Type $hint for up to 3 extra images.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any end user data.
install_msg: Load the cog with `[p]load animalguesser`, then start a game with `$animalguesser`.
name: AnimalGuesser
